title: PM Lee and Chinese President Xi Jinping reaffirm close ties between both countries
description: Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong and Chinese President Xi Jinping reaffirmed the close ties between Singapore and China on Thursday (Nov 17) during a meeting...
